title: SecurityCraft Server
description: A team-based survival server revolving around the mod SecurityCraft by the mod's creators
body:
# The official SecurityCraft server

![The SecurityCraft logo at spawn. Staff members and some active players are standing on top of it.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/d2DPztu5/images/73f2cabe6b469554e9c3c6372ef8ee61ec3b9a93.png)

Play the popular mod SecurityCraft with and against your friends and other players. This server is made by the mod's developers!

**🗡️ Raid bases, and protect your own with all the blocks SecurityCraft has to offer! 🗡️**  
On this server, breaking into bases and stealing valuables is explicitly allowed. But do not worry - with SecurityCraft's vast selection of base protection, access-restricting, and defensive blocks, you can reinforce your base to the highest capabilities to prepare against attacks from enemies.

**♥️ Benefit from a pure survival server with a responsive staff team who listens to the community! ♥️**  
We are active on Discord and the server itself. Even when no staff member is online, the Minecraft chat is relayed to our Discord server so we can jump in whenever there is a need. This ensure that rulebreakers, for example griefers and hackers, are quickly caught and punished appropriately.

**🤗 Join a team, or create your own to become the strongest on the server! 🤗**  
The server is based on team ownership, so players hunkering down in the same base will be able to share their SecurityCraft blocks and defend their belongings together.

**⏲️ The more you play, the more you unlock! ⏲️**  
We have special perks like cosmetics and secret area access for dedicated players who reached specific playtime milestones.

**🎮 Play special activities! 🎮**  
From time to time we release minigames for players to experience. Some may even give a reward!

![A picture taken at night using shaders of a hotel near spawn by a river. There are colorful beacon beams in the background alongside a floating, circular observation deck.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a15816a20b9108762544f4ba1d51e4db6070547.jpeg)
